title: genea sterilis
intro: Genea sterilis, commonly known as Lonicera, is a type of flowering vine plant in the honeysuckle family, native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The therapeutic actions of Genea sterilis include antimicrobial, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and ease respiratory distress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects.
